It looks like Micro RGB tech is becoming more common as a choice for TV makers to use, in addition to OLEDs. And as the tech advances, come up with more ways to make the colour reproduction of the former match the latter as much as possible. Sony has teased its own take, in what […]

The post Sony Teases True RGB TV Tech; For Better Colours To Match Up To OLED appeared first on Lowyat.NET.
